name: web3-student-lab-root
description: Root configuration for Web3 Student Lab monorepo

scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev-all: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build-all: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.start-all: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run start --prefix frontend"
